rationale: Section 31.08 governs tax certificatesand lien extinguishment when a homestead exemption was erroneously allowed and later canceled. Raising the exemption dollar amount does not alter these certificate or lien procedures.
quote: a residence homestead exemption was erroneously allowed for the property and was subsequently canceled
_note: No operative conflict; §31.08 references homestead exemptions only in the context of erroneous-allowance cancellation, not exemption amount.
